text:
(where the expert is within laa rates and hours)

The following directions shall apply to the instruction of [name of expert]:

The lead for the instruction of the expert shall be [name].

The letter of instruction to the expert [as approved by the court today] / [to be agreed by the parties by 4.00pm on [date] and filed at court] must be sent the expert by 4.00pm on [date].

The issues in the proceedings to which the expert evidence relates are:

[insert].

The questions to be dealt with by the expert are [as set out in the draft letter of instruction] / [as follows: [insert]]

Permission is [not] given for the expert to see and assess the child[ren].

Permission is [not] given to call [name] to give oral evidence at the [final] / [finding of fact] hearing.

(where the expert is outside laa rates or hours)

The following directions shall apply to the instruction of [name of expert]:

The lead for the instruction of the expert shall be [name].

The letter of instruction to the expert [as approved by the court today] / [to be agreed by the parties by 4.00pm on [date] and filed at court] must be sent to the expert by 4.00pm on [date].

The issues in the proceedings to which the expert evidence relates are:

[Insert].

The court is of the view that the facts of the case are exceptional, as defined in paragraph 2(2) of Schedule 5 of the Regulations, and the experts instructed are essential to enable a fair and just conclusion of the proceedings because:

[Insert Judge’s reasons].

Complexity of material justifies appointment of a senior expert.

Material of specialised and unusual nature.

[Insert confirmation of number of experts approached and reasons why that expert should be appointed].

The questions to be dealt with by the expert are [as set out in the draft letter of instruction] / [as follows: [insert]].

Permission is [not] given for the expert to see and assess the child[ren].

Permission is [not] given to call [name] to give oral evidence at the [final] / [finding of fact] hearing.

Extension of proceedings
